{{Quote|The threat Callandri posed has only been amplified by her founding of the Granse Confederacy.|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]]|<ref name="AIR" />}}
The '''Granse Confederacy''' was a well-structured coalition of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] and trackers that appeared on the [[Galactic community|galactic]] scene shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. They were known for their tendency to perform other's dirty work, which they called "discreet problem solving."<ref name="AIR" />

==History==
The group had only eight members, but all were formerly employed in some criminal organization, and were known for their abilities to locate and eliminate "problems." The Confederacy was founded by [[Callandri]] and her cousin, [[Zayl Braith]]. Its members included the [[Alien/Legends|aliens]] [[Kiran Tatch]], [[Arcuse]] and [[Rodick Tag]], who had worked for [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] syndicates before being blacklisted; plus [[Milacass]], [[Vadon Lenitor]], and [[Lu'daal-ud]], who "left behind their pasts" to join the Confederacy.<ref name="AIR" />

[[File:VadonLenitorLudaalud-AIR.jpg|thumb|left|150px|[[Lu'daal-ud]] and [[Vadon Lenitor]]]]
In a short time, they managed to store an impressive collection of equipment, weapons, and vehicles, including three starships: Callandri's [[Stalwart-class light freighter|''Stalwart''-class freighter]] ''[[Nightcast]]'' (with her land vehicle, a [[Jadai Motors|Jadai]] [[Q-6100]], on the hold), Lu'daal-ud's [[Koensayr Manufacturing/Legends|Koensayr Manufacturing]] [[Sigma-class shuttle|''Sigma''-class shuttle]] ''[[Mist Laden]]'' and Milacass's stolen Calamari freighter ''[[Waterspire]]'' (although the Confederacy tended to use the first two ships because they were much more discreet).<ref name="AIR" />

During some point of [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Task Force on Alliance Security|Task Force]] reported that the Granse Confederacy had performed at least six attacks against Rebel personnel in only four months. Lu'daal-ud managed to get some high-security files about then-current Rebel operation on [[Shiwal sector/Legends|Shiwal]] and [[Cademimu sector/Legends|Cademimu sectors]], increasing the danger posed towards the Alliance. Milacass' ''Waterspire'' was also stolen from Rebel agents. General [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] considered the Confederacy a great threat to the Rebel Alliance.<ref name="AIR" />

Many within the Alliance's command structure believed that the Confederacy was formed specifically to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] [[Alton Lochner]], given Callandri's grudge against him, but this was never proven. However, it was known that other members of the Granse Confederacy knew of Callandri's motivation against Lochner.<ref name="AIR" />
